How's it going everybody? In this video I'm going to show you how to take information from your ClickFunnels account and put it right onto a Google sheet automatically using Zapier. So before you watch this video make sure you've set up your Zapier account, make sure you've set up your ClickFunnels account and you've created the funnel that you're going to use for ads and make sure that you have your Google account set up and you're signed into it. So the first thing we want to do is go to ClickFunnels. So you'll just do ClickFunnels.com, log in if you need to. We want to move to ClickFunnels at the top and click Funnels and this is going to list all of the funnels on your account. Go ahead and pick the funnel that you're going to use for this lead generation. It's going to take you to the main page that's perfect and right next to the URL the link, go ahead and click that button up at the right. It's going to open it up so that way you can actually fill out this form like you are a client or lead. So I'm going to hit that send me my voucher, fill in some test information. This was already filled in. You'll have to fill that in name, email address, phone number and then hit that send me my voucher button or whatever your button says. It should take you to your thank you page. This is a great time to make sure that everything works well but that creates sample information. That way we can make sure that this is working and we can use that to create our own sample information. So now that we've created the sample and click funnels, we can actually close out ClickFunnels. Now you need a lead sheet for Google sheets. If you already have one or you want to make your own, that's fine. We're also going to include a lead sheet below. Just click the button. It'll take you to this screen to make a copy of it. We'll hit that blue, make a copy and now you have your own copy of this leads tracking sheet. You can make changes to it if you remember. If you make any changes to these first column headers, it's going to change it when you make this app. So just keep that in mind if things don't match up exactly as you see here. If you want to change the name of the sheet, click up at the top left name it whatever you want to call it. I always like good names so let me know exactly what the file is just for my glance. So that changes the name. If you want to put in a folder so you're organizing things, you can hit that folder icon right there. You can either make a new folder by clicking that button, type in the folder name, and hit the check mark to make a new folder or you can use the existing folder. So if you have a folder you want to use, click on that and then once you're ready hit the blue move button. It'll tell you that that sheet has been moved into the folder. So now we have our lead sheet set up. We have most of the columns that you should need. Not all of these are provided in ClickFunnels, just the first four. So we won't really work with the other ones. Those are for you to fill in manually just to keep track of these leads and how they work on. Now that we have this let's go ahead and head to Zapier. So that's going to be just zapier.com. Log in if you need to. Once you're inside of Zapier, you want to click this make a zap button up at the top right. This is going to take you to the zap builder screen. So the first thing I suggest is give it a good name. Something that you'll recognize. You can name yours whatever you'd like. Now the first thing that we need to set up as far as the actual function of this app is the trigger. The trigger is what needs to happen to make the zap kick into action to make it start going. So let's click here where it says search hundreds of apps and I'm going to start typing in click funnels. Once you see click funnels up there, you can go and click on it. Now these are the three different triggers that you can use with click funnels. There's new failed purchase, new successful purchase, but the one we want is new contact activity. That's going to be whenever somebody is added as a contact when they fill out their information. So once you have that selected that blue saving continue button. Now if you already have a click funnels account connected to Zapier, it's going to be listed here. I don't. So I'm going to hit this connect an account button. Let's go ahead and hit connect an account. And since I was already signed into click funnels, it just connected. I didn't have to sign in. If you weren't signed into click funnels, it's going to ask for your click funnels email address and password and then it will connect it just like this. So now that we have an account connected, I always recommend testing it. So hit that test button and shows it's good to go. Let's go ahead and hit that blue saving continue at the bottom right. Now this is when it should look for new contacts by default. It's going to look through all of your funnels, but we want to keep these separated so that way you know which challenge they opted into. So you're under funnel. Let's go ahead and choose the drop down arrow. They may take a few moments to pull in all of your funnels. We have a lot of funnels, so it does take a while. Yours should hopefully not take this long. But this is really important to do that way. It's only pulling in the contacts for that specific funnel. It's not doing it for every single funnel you make for now and forever. So going to scroll down to the very bottom to see my most recent funnels. There's that cold traffic funnel that I tested. Now that we have our funnel selected, we can go and choose a funnel step. You don't always have to do this, but it's good to do it. Sometimes if your form is capturing information on multiple pages, you could end up with multiple entries from one person filling it out once. So go ahead and open up funnel steps and you want to choose the first one there. That's our squeeze page in this case. So now we have our funnel selected. We have our squeeze page selected, our first page where they actually enter their information. We're going to go ahead and click this blue continue button. It's going to look for samples. So that's why we went through and filled out our form. Not only to test it, but to give us that sample information. Now that we have it, it's selected. Let's go and hit this blue continue button right there. Now our first step is done. We need to go ahead and add a second step. So let's go and hit this add a step on the left hand side. We're going to choose action slash slash search right there. Then here where it says choose an action app, go and click search hundreds of apps. If you don't see it already, start typing in sheets and you'll see Google sheets and go and pick that. Now we want to create a new row on that lead sheet every time somebody fills it out. So let's go and choose create spreadsheet row. Then hit save and continue at the bottom right. I don't have my Google sheets account connected. So I have to connect an account. If yours is already connected, you don't need to do a new account every time. I'm going to go and choose my account. Give it permission. There's my Google sheets account. I'm going to test it just to make sure it works. And we're good to go. It's good and hit that blue saving continue button at the bottom right. Now we need to tell it which sheet inside of our Google account. It's going to put that information on. So here's the first spreadsheet. We'll click that drop down arrow. And there's our sheet. Make sure you pick the right one. Now wants to know which worksheet, which is the tabs at the bottom. There's only one tab on my sheet at the bottom. So I'm going to go and choose that only one that's there. Now it's going to pull in all of those columns. So if I look at the sheet as all of these column headers, it pulls in every single one of those. So I'm only going to do the ones that we got from ClickFunnels. So let's go and choose first name. So I hit that plus. Then the first step is new contact activity. I'm looking for first name. Once I click it, it puts it in there and it shows us what that sample first name was. It's going to do the same for last name. So I'm going to hit that plus for insert a field under last name. I'm going to look for last name, click on that and scroll down. And we're going to do email address. So I'm hitting that plus under email, choosing email, and then phone number. So I'll hit the plus under phone, then choose phone. So let's just review this to make sure. Under spreadsheet, we chose the lead spreadsheet that we want all of these to go to. For worksheet, we chose which tab at the bottom. I only have one, which was called leads. So that's fine. Now first name, it's going to pull the first name from step one and put it there. Last name is going to be the last name from step one and put it there. Email from step one for email and the phone number from step one for phone. That's all we need to worry about on this. So go and scroll down to the bottom and hit continue. It's going to show you what information it's going to try to test with. So let's go and hit this blue send test to Google Sheets button at the bottom right. So it shows this green attest spreadsheet row ascent. So that means it should have worked. Let's go and check our lead sheet. And there we go. We have our new lead. And so from now on, as long as the zap is on, it will automatically take the leads from click funnels and put this on the sheet. So that looks great. Let's go and hit this finish button at the bottom right. And now we want to make sure our zap is turned on. That means it's going to be watching that click funnel every single time. All right, so we are good to go with this. We can go and hit dashboard up at the top left to go back to the main and Xavier folder. You can see our news app is right there. It's on. We can hit the drop down arrow and you can edit it. Maybe you need to change a step or you want to rename it. If you create a folder and you want to put in a folder, you can do that. If you want to see what the zap's done in the past, you can choose task history. Now we haven't had anybody fill out this form, but now that the zap is on, if somebody fills out the form, you can come back here and check. Or if you're worried that somebody's filling out the form, but it's not connecting, this gives you a place to see what may have happened there. All right, well, I hope you enjoyed this video. We walked you through creating a sample on your click funnels account. We went ahead and got a leads spreadsheet and Google sheets. And then we made a zap in Zapier that takes the new contacts from click funnels and puts them onto that Google sheets. Hope you have a great rest of your day.
